results.title: EP approved new air passenger rights. Here's what could change for travellers
results.description: Parents will also have the right to free seating next to their children under the new rules. Photo: Matthew Mirabelli

results.title: The Latest: President Trump pleases Turkey, angers other allies ahead of NATO summit
results.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has met with Turkish leader Recep Tayyip Erdoğan ahead of the NATO summit in Ankara. He announced that the U.S. will lift sanctions, opening the possibility of selling F-35 jets to Turkey over Israel’s objections. Trump...

results.title: Farage looked rattled. But has he pulled off another political masterstroke?
results.description: For the first time in his career, Nigel Farage looked genuinely flustered when he delivered his speech today
